info.title: Veri API
info.description: REST API for the Veri RL post-training platform. All requests require a Bearer API key (`vk_` prefix).

200.description: A paginated list of API keys
The created key, including the plaintext value returned once

404.description: Not found or not owned by the caller

200.description: Current spend rate, balance, and active jobs
A paginated list of credit/debit transactions

422.description: The `file` field is missing or empty

200.description: Code redeemed; credits added to balance

404.description: Code not found

200.description: The created (or existing, on content-hash match) dataset

422.description: Empty file, invalid JSONL, or a row missing the 'prompt' field

200.description: The connected (or existing, on identical config) dataset
Validation result for the dataset connection

parameters.name: provider
parameters.description:
"aws" | "hotaisle" | "vast" | "digitalocean". Absent = every probeable
provider we can reach.

parameters.name: region
parameters.description:
Region filter. AWS: a real region. Hot Aisle: "hotaisle-us".
DigitalOcean: a DO region slug (e.g. "tor1").

200.description: Live GPU availability rows across providers
A list of the caller's custom models

task.description: Catalog id used as `task` in a benchmark scorer (e.g. "gsm8k").

tier.description: "inference_only" or "code_exec" (code_exec runs each sample in a sandbox).

num_samples.description: Total rows in the source split; cap with `sample_limit`.

key.description: Plaintext key returned ONCE on creation. Save it immediately.

CustomScriptConfig.description:
The BYO-script payload. Persisted verbatim as TrainingJob.script_config_json
and read back by the worker launch path (forward contract).

engine.description: Inference engine: "vllm" (default) or "max" (Modular MAX). Omitted => vllm.

num_replicas.description:
VS-341: number of GPU-box replicas to launch (fixed N; no autoscaling in
this chunk). Omitted => 1, which is byte-for-byte today's single-box
behavior. Validated 1..=8 at create.
VS-341: number of serving replicas (GPU boxes) behind this deployment.

DepsSpec.description:
Dependency layer for a custom_script job. The worker installs these inside the
container before the entrypoint (uv pip). `kind` is "requirements" | "uv_lock"
| "none"; `content` is the file text for the first two.

dataset_id.description:
Optional when the (single) scorer is a benchmark — benchmark tasks
supply their own rows. Required for every other scorer type.

GpuAvailabilityRow.description:
One availability row. Mirrors the transport `AvailabilityRow` JSON (SA-3); the
control plane passes it through verbatim. Optional fields are provider-shaped,
so `serde(default)` lets a row the transport omitted a field on still parse.

gpu_count.description: GPUs per launchable unit (Hot Aisle VM cards; AWS whole-node GPU count).

status.description:
"AVAILABLE" (Hot Aisle live qty>0), "OFFERED" (AWS catalog + spot proxy),
or "UNAVAILABLE".

available.description: Hot Aisle live count of launchable VMs of this shape (absent for AWS).

spot_score.description: AWS Spot placement score 1–10 proxy (absent for Hot Aisle).

price_per_hr.description:
Per-GPU USD/hr for this shape. On the wire from the transport this is the
provider's RAW published rate; before returning to the caller the endpoint
marks it up by the per-provider markup (VS-344) so it matches the customer
price on /v1/cost/rates and never leaks the raw margin.

GpuInfo.description:
Pydantic `GPUInfo` (with `type` field). Rust uses `gpu_type` internally
but serializes as "type" for JSON parity.

num_replicas.description: VS-341: number of serving replicas (GPU boxes) behind this deployment.

default.description: True for the home region used when a job specifies no region.

launch_enabled.description:
Whether training jobs may launch into this region right now. A listed
region with `launch_enabled: false` is coming soon (visible while its
substrate is provisioned); submit rejects it. VS-257 Phase 1.

default.description: The default/home region name (echoed for convenience / CLI highlighting).

bearerAuth.description: API key with the `vk_` prefix. Create one from the dashboard.
